query.text:
declare @ma_tt nvarchar(16), @so_tt nvarchar(255), @so_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ten_bc nvarchar(255), @ten_bc2 nvarchar(255) declare @ma_kh varchar(16), @ngay_ct smalldatetime, @nDu_dk NUMERIC(16, 2), @nDu_dk_nt NUMERIC(16, 2), @Account varchar(16), @so_ps numeric (16,3), @so_ps_nt numeric (16,3)
select @ma_kh = ma_kh, @ngay_ct = ngay_ct, @Account =tk from @@prime$partition$current where stt_rec = @stt_rec --Lay phat sinh phieu hien tai select @so_ps = sum(ps_no), @so_ps_nt = sum(ps_no_nt) from ct00 where tk=@Account and ma_kh=@ma_kh and stt_rec = @stt_rec
SELECT TOP 0 du_no00 AS du, du_no_nt00 AS du_nt INTO #Balance FROM cdkh INSERT INTO #Balance EXEC dbo.MaxvOnline$Balance$Customer @ngay_ct, '', @Account, @ma_kh, 2, 1, @@userID, @@admin SELECT @nDu_dk = du - isnull(@so_ps,0), @nDu_dk_nt = du_nt - isnull(@so_ps_nt,0) FROM #Balance drop table #Balance
select @ma_tt = rtrim(ltrim(val)) from options where name='r_cdkt' select @so_tt=so_tt, @so_tt2 = so_tt2, @ngay_tt = ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 = ngay_tt2 from report1 where ma_tt=@ma_tt select @ten_bc = ten_bc, @ten_bc2=ten_bc2 from report2 where ma_tt=@ma_tt and sysid='ISTran'
if dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$CheckSQLInjection(@stt_rec) = 0 return if @@form = '011' begin exec pr_PrintSVTranMultiCopies @stt_rec, @@id, 'm81$$partition$current', 'd81$$partition$current', @@language, @@userID, @@admin return end &GLTranReportSql; else begin declare @m_ma_nt0 varchar(10), @key varchar(128) select @m_ma_nt0 = val from options where name = N'm_ma_nt0' if @@form = '111' or @@form = '112' or @@form = '511' or @@form = '521' or @@form = '531' or @@form ='522' or @@form ='310' begin
-- Lay tk_vt trong dmvt cach nhau bang dau ',' create table #dmtkvt(tk_vt nvarchar(64)) insert into #dmtkvt select distinct tk_vt from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join d81$$partition$current b with(nolock) on (a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec) where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
declare @tk_vt nvarchar(64) = '' select @tk_vt = @tk_vt + ',' + LTRIM(RTRIM(tk_vt)) from #dmtkvt select @tk_vt = RIGHT(@tk_vt, LEN(@tk_vt) - 1) drop table #dmtkvt
select case when a.ong_ba <> '' then a.ong_ba else case when @@language = 'V' then b.ten_kh else b.ten_kh2 end end as ong_ba, e.dia_chi, a.dien_giai, c.ma_kho, isnull(d.dia_chi,'') dia_diem, ltrim(a.so_ct) so_ct, a.t_tien, a.t_tien_nt,a.t_ck,a.t_ck_nt, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(@m_ma_nt0, a.t_tien, @@language) as t_tien_in_word, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(a.ma_nt, a.t_tien_nt, @@language) as t_tien_nt_in_word, replace(str(day(a.ngay_ct),2),' ','0') ngay, replace(str(month(a.ngay_ct),2),' ','0') thang, cast(year(a.ngay_ct) as char(4)) nam, @tk_vt as tk_vt, a.tk, a.ma_kh, b.ten_kh, b.ten_kh2, (a.t_tien2 + isnull(a.t_ck,0)) as t_tien2, (a.t_tien_nt2 + isnull(a.t_ck,0)) as t_tien_nt2, a.t_tt, a.t_tt_nt, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(@m_ma_nt0, a.t_tt, 'V') as t_tt_in_word, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(a.ma_nt, a.t_tt_nt, 'V') as t_tt_nt_in_word, a.t_thue, a.t_thue_nt, d.ten_kho, d.ten_kho2, @so_tt as so_tt, @so_tt2 as so_tt2, @ngay_tt as ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 as ngay_tt2, @ten_bc as ten_bc, @ten_bc2 as ten_bc2, @nDu_dk_nt as tien_no_cu_nt, @nDu_dk as tien_no_cu from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join dmkh b with(nolock) on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh left join d81$$partition$current c with(nolock) on (a.stt_rec = c.stt_rec and c.stt_rec0 = (select min(stt_rec0) from d81$$partition$current with(nolock) where stt_rec = a.stt_rec)) left join dmkho d with(nolock) on c.ma_kho = d.ma_kho left join ctgt21 e with(nolock) on a.stt_rec = e.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
select @key = 'a.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec pr_PrintISTranSVTran @@language, @key, 'd81$$partition$current', @@id end else begin if @@form = '010' or @@form = '020' or @@form = '011' or @@form = '021' or @@form = '110' or @@form = '120' begin select a.ong_ba as doi_tac, a.ma_kh, e.ten_kh as ten_kh, e.ten_kh as ten_kh2, e.ma_so_thue, e.dia_chi, b.tk_nh, c.ten_ngan as thanh_toan, c.ten_ngan2 as thanh_toan2, case when @@language = 'V' then N'1: Lưu' else '1: Backup' end as so_lien, isnull(k.ky_hieu, '') ky_hieu, a.so_seri, a.so_ct, a.ngay_ct, cast(cast(d.thue_suat as int) as varchar)+'%' as thue_suat, a.ma_nt, (a.t_tien2 + a.t_ck) as t_tien2, (a.t_tien_nt2 + a.t_ck_nt) as t_tien_nt2, a.t_thue, a.t_thue_nt, a.t_tt, a.t_tt_nt, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(@m_ma_nt0, a.t_tt, @@language) as t_tt_in_word, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(a.ma_nt, a.t_tt_nt, @@language) as t_tt_nt_in_word, replace(str(day(a.ngay_ct),2),' ','0') ngay, replace(str(month(a.ngay_ct),2),' ','0') thang, cast(year(a.ngay_ct) as char(4)) nam, a.dien_giai, @so_tt as so_tt, @so_tt2 as so_tt2, @ngay_tt as ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 as ngay_tt2, @ten_bc as ten_bc, @ten_bc2 as ten_bc2, @nDu_dk_nt as tien_no_cu_nt, @nDu_dk as tien_no_cu from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join dmkh b with(nolock) on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh left join dmtt c with(nolock) on a.ma_tt = c.ma_tt left join dmthue d with(nolock) on a.ma_thue = d.ma_thue left join ctgt21 e with(nolock) on a.stt_rec = e.stt_rec left join v20dmnk k with(nolock) on a.ma_nk = k.ma_nk where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec end else begin select a.ong_ba as doi_tac, a.ma_kh, e.ten_kh as ten_kh, e.ten_kh as ten_kh2, e.ma_so_thue, e.dia_chi, b.tk_nh, c.ten_ngan as thanh_toan, c.ten_ngan2 as thanh_toan2, case when @@language = 'V' then N'1: Lưu' else '1: Backup' end as so_lien, isnull(k.ky_hieu, '') ky_hieu, a.so_seri, a.so_ct, a.ngay_ct, cast(cast(d.thue_suat as int) as varchar)+'%' as thue_suat, a.ma_nt, (a.t_tien2 + a.t_ck) as t_tien2, (a.t_tien_nt2 + a.t_ck_nt) as t_tien_nt2, a.t_thue, a.t_thue_nt, a.t_tt, a.t_tt_nt, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(@m_ma_nt0, a.t_tien2 + a.t_ck, @@language) as t_tt_in_word, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(a.ma_nt, a.t_tien_nt2 + a.t_ck, @@language) as t_tt_nt_in_word, replace(str(day(a.ngay_ct),2),' ','0') ngay, replace(str(month(a.ngay_ct),2),' ','0') thang, cast(year(a.ngay_ct) as char(4)) nam, a.dien_giai, @so_tt as so_tt, @so_tt2 as so_tt2, @ngay_tt as ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 as ngay_tt2, @ten_bc as ten_bc, @ten_bc2 as ten_bc2, @nDu_dk_nt as tien_no_cu_nt, @nDu_dk as tien_no_cu from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join dmkh b with(nolock) on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh left join dmtt c with(nolock) on a.ma_tt = c.ma_tt left join dmthue d with(nolock) on a.ma_thue = d.ma_thue left join ctgt21 e with(nolock) on a.stt_rec = e.stt_rec left join v20dmnk k with(nolock) on a.ma_nk = k.ma_nk where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec end
select @key = 'a.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec pr_PrintSVTran @@language, @key, 'd81$$partition$current', @@id end end

header.v: Cộng tiền bán hàng hóa, dịch vụ:
(Cần kiểm tra, đối chiếu khi lập, giao, nhận hóa đơn)
header.e: (Please do check, compare when issuing, delivering and receiving invoice)

header.v: (In tại Công ty ........., Mã số thuế ......... )
Họ và tên người nhận hàng:
Số chứng từ gốc kèm theo:
